text.title: Testing in JavaScript / TypeScript Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply testing-javascript. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Fingerprint the project: detect Vite/Next/webpack/CRA and pick Vitest or Jest by rule r1.
step.description: Input: package.json + build configs. Action: Read configs, write runner choice.. Output: decision record.
step.note: Step 1. Required input: package.json + build configs.

step.name: Install runner + Testing Library + MSW; create `vitest.config.ts` or `jest.config.cjs`.
step.description: Input: package.json. Action: `npm install --save-dev` chosen deps; commit config.. Output: runner config.

step.name: Write `setup.ts` wiring `@testing-library/jest-dom`, MSW server, fake timer teardown.
step.description: Input: runner config. Action: Create file; reference from config.. Output: setup.ts.

step.name: Author component/unit tests using ARIA-first queries.
step.description: Input: components under test. Action: Write `*.test.tsx` / `*.test.ts` files.. Output: test files.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: components under test.

step.name: Configure coverage thresholds and CI job (`run --coverage --reporter=verbose`).
step.description: Input: test files. Action: Update config + CI YAML.. Output: CI gate.
